Proof for Corollary 8 
                         Given a binomial with  
                               n 
                             trials, there are  
                               n 
                               + 
                               1 
                             possible outcomes corresponding to the number of “successes” being  
                               0 
                               , 
                               1 
                               , 
                               … 
                               , 
                               n 
                            . Also,  
                               
                                  
                                     
                                        
                                           
                                              
                                                 p 
                                              
                                              
                                                 j 
                                                 + 
                                                 1 
                                              
                                           
                                           
                                           
                                              
                                                 p 
                                              
                                              
                                                 j 
                                                 − 
                                                 1 
                                              
                                           
                                        
                                        
                                           
                                              
                                                 p 
                                              
                                              
                                                 j 
                                              
                                              
                                                 2 
                                              
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                     = 
                                     
                                        
                                           j 
                                           ! 
                                           
                                           j 
                                           ! 
                                           
                                           
                                              ( 
                                              n 
                                              − 
                                              j 
                                              ) 
                                           
                                           ! 
                                           
                                           
                                              ( 
                                              n 
                                              − 
                                              j 
                                              ) 
                                           
                                           ! 
                                        
                                        
                                           
                                              ( 
                                              j 
                                              − 
                                              1 
                                              ) 
                                           
                                           ! 
                                           
                                           
                                              ( 
                                              n 
                                              − 
                                              j 
                                              + 
                                              1 
                                              ) 
                                           
                                           ! 
                                           
                                           
                                              ( 
                                              j 
                                              + 
                                              1 
                                              ) 
                                           
                                           ! 
                                           
                                           
                                              ( 
                                              n 
                                              − 
                                              j 
                                              − 
                                              1 
                                              ) 
                                           
                                           ! 
                                        
                                     
                                     = 
                                     
                                        
                                           j 
                                           
                                           
                                              ( 
                                              n 
                                              − 
                                              j 
                                              ) 
                                           
                                        
                                        
                                           
                                              ( 
                                              j 
                                              + 
                                              1 
                                              ) 
                                           
                                           
                                           
                                              ( 
                                              n 
                                              − 
                                              j 
                                              + 
                                              1 
                                              ) 
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                     < 
                                     1 
                                     . 
                                  
                               
                             Consequently, the binomial distribution is a SLC sequence and because of  Theorem 30  the distribution has monotonically decreasing reverse hazard.  □

Given a binomial with  
                               n 
                             trials, there are  
                               n 
                               + 
                               1 
                             possible outcomes corresponding to the number of “successes” being  
                               0 
                               , 
                               1 
                               , 
                               … 
                               , 
                               n 
                            . Also,  
                               
                                  
                                     
                                        
                                           
                                              
                                                 p 
                                              
                                              
                                                 j 
                                                 + 
                                                 1 
                                              
                                           
                                           
                                           
                                              
                                                 p 
                                              
                                              
                                                 j 
                                                 − 
                                                 1 
                                              
                                           
                                        
                                        
                                           
                                              
                                                 p 
                                              
                                              
                                                 j 
                                              
                                              
                                                 2 
                                              
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                     = 
                                     
                                        
                                           j 
                                           ! 
                                           
                                           j 
                                           ! 
                                           
                                           
                                              ( 
                                              n 
                                              − 
                                              j 
                                              ) 
                                           
                                           ! 
                                           
                                           
                                              ( 
                                              n 
                                              − 
                                              j 
                                              ) 
                                           
                                           ! 
                                        
                                        
                                           
                                              ( 
                                              j 
                                              − 
                                              1 
                                              ) 
                                           
                                           ! 
                                           
                                           
                                              ( 
                                              n 
                                              − 
                                              j 
                                              + 
                                              1 
                                              ) 
                                           
                                           ! 
                                           
                                           
                                              ( 
                                              j 
                                              + 
                                              1 
                                              ) 
                                           
                                           ! 
                                           
                                           
                                              ( 
                                              n 
                                              − 
                                              j 
                                              − 
                                              1 
                                              ) 
                                           
                                           ! 
                                        
                                     
                                     = 
                                     
                                        
                                           j 
                                           
                                           
                                              ( 
                                              n 
                                              − 
                                              j 
                                              ) 
                                           
                                        
                                        
                                           
                                              ( 
                                              j 
                                              + 
                                              1 
                                              ) 
                                           
                                           
                                           
                                              ( 
                                              n 
                                              − 
                                              j 
                                              + 
                                              1 
                                              ) 
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                     < 
                                     1 
                                     . 
                                  
                               
                             Consequently, the binomial distribution is a SLC sequence and because of  Theorem 30  the distribution has monotonically decreasing reverse hazard.  □

Proof for Corollary 9 
                         The probability for the  
                               k 
                            th event for the Poisson distribution is

                                           + 
                                           1 
                                        
                                     
                                     < 
                                     1 
                                     . 
                                  
                               
                             Hence the Poisson distribution is a SLC sequence and by  Theorem 30  has monotonically decreasing reverse hazard.  □

                               k 
                            th event for the Poisson distribution is

                                           k

                                     1 
                                     . 
                                  
                               
                             Hence the Poisson distribution is a SLC sequence and by  Theorem 30  has monotonically decreasing reverse hazard.  □

Proof for Theorem 31 
                         
                            Keilson and Gerber (1971)  proved that SLC sequences are closed under the operation of convolution. They also proved that the convolution of a SLC sequence and a strictly unimodal sequence is also a SLC sequence. Given these facts, the theorem follows as a consequence of  Theorem 30 .  □

Keilson and Gerber (1971)  proved that SLC sequences are closed under the operation of convolution. They also proved that the convolution of a SLC sequence and a strictly unimodal sequence is also a SLC sequence. Given these facts, the theorem follows as a consequence of  Theorem 30 .  □

Proof for Theorem 33 
                         
                            Chechile (2003, Theorem 15)  used an inductive proof to show that the hazard function  
                               
                                  
                                     λ 
                                  
                                  
                                     k 
                                  
                               
                             was monotonically decreasing for a general mixture of discrete distributions that have components with nonincreasing hazard. Thus from  Theorem 28  it follows that the reverse hazard for the mixture must also be monotonically decreasing.  □

Chechile (2003, Theorem 15)  used an inductive proof to show that the hazard function

                             was monotonically decreasing for a general mixture of discrete distributions that have components with nonincreasing hazard. Thus from  Theorem 28  it follows that the reverse hazard for the mixture must also be monotonically decreasing.  □

Proof for Theorem 36 
                         The probability of the disjunctive system on exactly the  
                               k 
                            th trial,  
                               
                                  
                                     p 
                                  
                                  
                                     k 
                                  
                               
                               
                                  ( 
                                  
                                     dis 
                                  
                                  ) 
                               
                            , is equal to the probability that all  
                               n 
                             components succeed on the initial  
                               k 
                               − 
                               1 
                             events AND not all components succeed on the  
                               k 
                            th event. From a hazard tree representation, it follows that  
                               
                                  
                                     
                                        
                                           p 
                                        
                                        
                                           k 
                                        
                                     
                                     
                                        ( 
                                        
                                           dis 
                                        
                                        ) 
                                     
                                     = 
                                     
                                        [ 
                                        
                                           
                                              ∏ 
                                           
                                           
                                              j 
                                              = 
                                              1 
                                           
                                           
                                              k 
                                              − 
                                              1 
                                           
                                        
                                        
                                        
                                           
                                              ∏ 
                                           
                                           
                                              i 
                                              = 
                                              1 
                                           
                                           
                                              n 
                                           
                                        
                                        
                                        
                                           ( 
                                           1 
                                           − 
                                           
                                              
                                                 λ 
                                              
                                              
                                                 j 
                                                 
                                                 i 
                                              
                                           
                                           ) 
                                        
                                        
                                        ] 
                                     
                                     
                                        [ 
                                        
                                        1 
                                        − 
                                        
                                           
                                              ∏ 
                                           
                                           
                                              i 
                                              = 
                                              1 
                                           
                                           
                                              n 
                                           
                                        
                                        
                                        
                                           ( 
                                           1 
                                           − 
                                           
                                              
                                                 λ 
                                              
                                              
                                                 k 
                                                 
                                                 i 
                                              
                                           
                                           ) 
                                        
                                        
                                        ] 
                                     
                                     . 
                                  
                               
                             The probability that the disjunctive system survives for the first  
                               k 
                               − 
                               1 
                             events is  
                               
                                  
                                     
                                        [ 
                                        
                                           
                                              ∏ 
                                           
                                           
                                              j 
                                              = 
                                              1 
                                           
                                           
                                              k 
                                              − 
                                              1 
                                           
                                        
                                        
                                        
                                           
                                              ∏ 
                                           
                                           
                                              i 
                                              = 
                                              1 
                                           
                                           
                                              n 
                                           
                                        
                                        
                                        
                                           ( 
                                           1 
                                           − 
                                           
                                              
                                                 λ 
                                              
                                              
                                                 j 
                                                 
                                                 i 
                                              
                                           
                                           ) 
                                        
                                        
                                        ] 
                                     
                                     . 
                                  
                               
                             The hazard is obtained from dividing  
                               
                                  
                                     p 
                                  
                                  
                                     k 
                                  
                               
                               
                                  ( 
                                  
                                     dis 
                                  
                                  ) 
                               
                             by the survival rate after the  
                               
                                  ( 
                                  k 
                                  − 
                                  1 
                                  ) 
                               
                            th event. The reverse hazard must be 1 for  
                               k 
                               = 
                               1 
                            . For  
                               k 
                               > 
                               1 
                            , the reverse hazard for the disjunctive system is obtained by multiplying the hazard for the disjunctive system by the system survivor function after  
                               
                                  ( 
                                  k 
                                  − 
                                  1 
                                  ) 
                               
                             event and dividing by the cumulative probability of failure of the disjunctive system after  
                               k 
                             events. The system survivor function after  
                               k 
                             events is equal to  
                               
                                  
                                     1 
                                     − 
                                     
                                        
                                           ∏ 
                                        
                                        
                                           i 
                                           = 
                                           1 
                                        
                                        
                                           n 
                                        
                                     
                                     
                                     
                                        ( 
                                        1 
                                        − 
                                        
                                           
                                              F 
                                           
                                           
                                              k 
                                              
                                              i 
                                           
                                        
                                        ) 
                                     
                                     . 
                                  
                               
                             Thus the reverse hazard for a disjunctive system for  
                               k 
                               > 
                               1 
                             is  
                               
                                  
                                     
                                        
                                           r 
                                        
                                        
                                           k 
                                        
                                     
                                     
                                        ( 
                                        
                                           dis 
                                        
                                        )

                                                    ∏ 
                                                 
                                                 
                                                    i
